title: Incorrect result on query involving LEFT JOIN and transitive constraints
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2(b TEXT, c DOUBLE);
CREATE TABLE t3(c INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, d INTEGER DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT 'a row' FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON b=a JOIN t3 ON c=a WHERE d IS NULL;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with transitive constraints in SQL query
